reviews.comment:
Buena atención, lo único que tienen para pagar con la app en los surtidores y en la tienda no? No entiendo cómo la aplican a la app, tendría que servir para ambas

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the only thing is they only have app payments at the pumps, not in the store? I don't understand how they're implementing it in the app; it should work for both.

reviews.comment:
Pocos servicios. La gente excelente pero no son los ACA de antes. El remolque si es buenisimo

(Translated by Google)
Limited services. The staff is excellent, but it's not the ACA of old. The towing service, however, is very good.

reviews.comment:
En el ACA de Bolivar nos trataron muy mal porque llegamos con la casa rodante a cargar combustible....es un lugar ANTIRODANTEROS

(Translated by Google)
At the ACA in Bolivar, they treated us very badly because we arrived with the camper van to refuel...it's an anti-camper van place

reviews.comment:
Está estación de servicio tiene lo necesario. Los baños con algo de falta de mantenimiento. Está en un lugar estratégico ya que no hay otra cerca.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station has everything you need. The restrooms are somewhat lacking in maintenance. It's in a strategic location since there's no other nearby.
